response: People with braces are dental appliances designed to correct misaligned teeth and improve oral health. They have no connection to gravitational forces or the ability to manipulate gravity. The concept of manipulating gravity at will is not supported by any scientific evidence and is outside the scope of what braces are capable of. This misunderstanding likely stems from a mix-up between dental devices and fictional or fantastical abilities. The weakness lies in the confusion between physical structures and supernatural capabilities. Weakness.
